# Kahu Ola — AI Context Primer for Gemma 4
# Generated by extract_kahuola_ai_ready.py

## System Identity
Kahu Ola ("Guardian of Life") is a civic hazard intelligence platform for Hawaiʻi.
Domain: kahuola.org | Stack: Cloudflare Worker (TypeScript) + GitHub Pages (HTML/JS)
GitHub: nguyenhuulong22/kahuola-web

## 5 Immutable Invariants
I.   Client NEVER calls NASA/NOAA/NWS/EPA/USGS/PacIOOS directly — all via Worker
II.  UI renders under ALL failure conditions — no blank screens ever
III. Parse fail → DROP data, return [], NEVER infer missing fields
IV.  Zero PII — user location stays on device, never transmitted
V.   Estimated perimeter ≠ official — always show disclaimer

## Data Flow
Browser → Cloudflare Worker (kahuola.org/api/*) → NASA FIRMS / NWS / NOAA / EPA / USGS / PacIOOS

## Canonical Hazard Signals
FireSignal | SmokeSignal | Perimeter | FloodSignal | StormSignal | AirQualitySignal | VolcanicSignal

## Production Lock
Never overwrite without explicit request: index.html, live-map.html, privacy.html, support.html

## Deploy Commands
Worker: cd ~/Documents/kahuola-web/worker && npx wrangler deploy
Website: git add . && git commit -m "feat: [desc]" && git push

## P1 Bugs (fix first)
